name: AMPCO PITTSBURGH CORP
summary: Ampco-Pittsburgh Corporation, incorporated in Pennsylvania in 1929, manufactures and sells highly engineered specialty metal products and customized equipment worldwide. It operates two segments: Forged and Cast Engineered Products (FCEP), producing forged hardened steel rolls, cast rolls, and forged engineered products for steel, aluminum, and metals industries; and Air and Liquid Processing (ALP), producing finned tube heat exchange coils, air handling systems, and centrifugal pumps for power generation, marine defense, and industrial markets.

products.name: Forged Hardened Steel Rolls
products.description: Used in hot and cold rolling mills by producers of steel, aluminum, and other metals.

products.name: Cast Rolls
products.description: Produced in various iron and steel qualities for hot strip mills, medium/heavy section mills, roughing mills, and plate mills.

products.name: Forged Engineered Products (FEP)
products.description: Sold to customers in steel distribution, oil and gas, aluminum and plastic extrusion industries.

products.name: Finned Tube Heat Exchange Coils
products.description: Custom-engineered heat transfer products for OEMs, nuclear power generation, and industrial manufacturing.

products.name: Air Handling Systems
products.description: Large custom-designed systems for institutional, pharmaceutical, and general industrial building markets.

products.name: Centrifugal Pumps
products.description: Manufactured for fossil-fueled power generation, marine defense, and industrial refrigeration industries.

partnerships.partner_name: Taiyuan Iron and Steel Co. Ltd.
partnerships.description: Joint venture Shanxi kers TISCO Roll Co., Ltd. producing cast rolls in Taiyuan, China; kers AB holds 59.88% interest.
Joint venture Anhui Baochang Roll Co., Ltd. producing large forged backup rolls in Maanshan, China; UES holds 33% interest.
